title: Improve task filter accessibility semantics
description: Add ARIA state and descriptive labels to Workspace Tasks filter chips and clear-search controls so keyboard and screen-reader users can understand which filters are active and how to clear them.

title: Add tasks empty-column action copy
description: Make empty task columns explain their next action more clearly, especially on compact mobile layouts where the add button can be ambiguous.

title: Expose task board refresh status text
description: Add a small non-intrusive refresh status indicator for the task board so users know when background polling or manual refresh is happening.

title: Fix Vitest unit-test include/exclude baseline
description: Adjust Vitest configuration so Playwright E2E specs and Odysseus TAP .mjs suites are excluded from pnpm test and run only under their dedicated runners.

title: Add task board refresh status text
description: Show a subtle status line when Workspace Tasks is polling or manually refreshing so users know the board is updating in the background.

title: Improve compact task column labels
description: Add clearer empty-column and compact-column action labels for mobile and keyboard users, including accessible names for add buttons.
